name: testErrorForInvalidCompanyNameLengthAndCharacters
description: Error message when trying to create a company with invalid length and special characters.
descriptionHtml: Error message when trying to create a company with invalid length and special characters.

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Error message when trying to create a company with invalid length and special characters.

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Click on the 'Create' button and trigger an error
Verify: error message for invalid length and character in company name
